description: SRE error budgets for Gentle-Vanguard stack services

agent_dispatch.description: 1% tolerance for agent dispatch failures over 30 days

script_performance.description: 5% tolerance for script SLO breaches over 7 days

pipeline_success.description: 5% tolerance for pipeline failures over 7 days (~3 failures/week)

consumption_actions.50_to_75: Warning: review recent changes, no critical deploys
consumption_actions.75_to_90: Freeze non-critical deploys, focus on reliability
consumption_actions.over_90: Full freeze, only hotfixes, immediate incident response
